calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-229 wanting!=liking: drive-coupled dissociation delta under effect-size gate (corrected criterion; supersedes 514p raw-C_WL)
items.note: Corrected-criterion successor per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514p_2026-06-15 (user-adjudicated). Makes the DRIVE-COUPLED dissociation delta (WL_drive - WL_nodrive) the LOAD-BEARING criterion under an effect-size gate mean_delta>=max(k*pstdev(delta),FLOOR), k=1.0 FLOOR=0.15 (user-chosen 2026-06-15; SD-of-delta NOT SD-of-baseline per feedback_effect_size_pass_gate_margin); raw C_WL>=0.6 demoted to a non-vacuity diagnostic. 6 seeds [42-47] (pools 514o+514p triples) + BEHAV 15->30 for a stable per-seed delta. Retains 603n contact guard + same-statistic WL readiness gate; gates a/b/b2 self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory) never a false weakens. supports if (c) else GENUINE weakens -> Woo/Spelke OFF+overshoot off-ramp. substrate built (SD-057 2026-06-04); substrate_queue action=none; MECH-229 stays provisional, no demotion.

items.title: GAP-A conversion readiness HYBRID control redesign (carry ARM_STD_G2 gain=2; matched-noise-at-proposer -> NEGATIVE control; C_CONVERSION = directed-gain strict-above LEGACY >=2/3; committed-layer metric-can-move guard; supersedes 684 mis-designed positive control)
items.note: Test-design-fixed successor per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-684_2026-06-15 (confirmed/applied). 684's load-bearing C_CONVERSION already PASSED (ARM_STD_G2 gain=2 committed entropy 0.989 strict-above legacy 0.775, 2/3) but its readiness gate FAILed on a MIS-DESIGNED matched-noise positive control (raises proposer temperature, structurally washed out by the F-dominated committed argmin -> can never lift = unsatisfiable; V3-EXQ-642 pattern). HYBRID fix (user-chosen 2026-06-15): carry ARM_STD_G2 (std basis, gain 2.0) forward as the leading conversion config (684 showed STD_G1 weaker 1/3, SHORTLIST hurt 0/3 -- both dropped); matched-noise-at-proposer reinterpreted as an UNDIRECTED NEGATIVE control (must NOT lift over proposer; informational sanity); LOAD-BEARING C_CONVERSION = ARM_STD_G2 committed entropy strict-above ARM_LEGACY_E2WF on >=2/3; committed-layer metric-can-move non-vacuity guard = ARM_LEGACY_E2WF committed entropy strict-above the collapsed ARM_PROPOSER reference on >=2/3 (proves the committed-selection-layer entropy metric is not pinned post-F). Retains the route-range + e2-divergence preconditions (both 3/3 in 684). claim_ids=[] diagnostic; cannot weaken ARC-065/MECH-341/ARC-062/MECH-309/MECH-294. PASS (conversion_mechanism_identified) selects the ARM_STD_G2 config for V3-EXQ-569h (the GAP-A falsifier, GATED on this PASS); readiness-unmet self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue; readiness-met+no-lift -> conversion_ceiling_persists_under_levers -> /failure-autopsy. HONEST SCOPE: a true undirected-post-F-noise arm (option-a verbatim) would need a substrate lever that does not exist; the guard is rendered substrate-free. No substrate change (conversion amend 1acc343 implemented+functional). Dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms end-to-end, substrate_not_ready at dry scale by design).
